business_goal: enableBridgeServer reflects native truth end-to-end: the server is 'ready' only with a real bound port confirmed by iOS/Android, retries up to 3 fresh random ports on bind failure, and ends at 'failed' otherwise — a silently dead server becomes impossible (UC-StartCacheServer, breadboard V1+V2 mechanism N2/N3/N4/S1).
